lasar.note: Letters and Science Academic Requirements (LASAR). Download the LASAR PDF for your catalog year from DUELS.

requirements_framework.total_units: 180–184 quarter units (184 if Area B foreign language completed at level 3)
ge_general_subject_areas: Area A: English Reading and Composition (A1 + A2)
Area C: Science, Mathematics, and Technology
Area E: Culture and Thought (minimum 2 courses)
requirements_framework.lasar_note: L&S uses LASAR (Letters and Science Academic Requirements), not CoE GEAR. Download LASAR from DUELS for your catalog year.

majors.name: Actuarial Science
majors.departmental_electives_note: Selective major. Transfer prep: Calc I–II, linear algebra, multivariable calc, intro programming (C or better, GPA 2.75+). SOA exam prep encouraged.

majors.name: Anthropology
majors.departmental_electives_note: Subfields: sociocultural, archaeology, biological anthropology.

majors.name: Applied Mathematics
upper_division_required: Applied math cluster electives (numerical, ODE/PDE, modeling)
majors.departmental_electives_note: BS Applied Mathematics emphasizes modeling and computation. Selective major with strong math GPA.

majors.name: Aquatic Biology
majors.department: Department of Ecology, Evolution, and Marine Biology
majors.departmental_electives_note: Focus on marine and freshwater systems. Field and lab intensive.

majors.name: Art
majors.departmental_electives_note: Studio areas include painting, sculpture, print, digital media, and photography.

majors.name: Asian American Studies
preparation_for_major: AS AM 1 — Introduction to Asian American Studies
Related ethnic studies or history survey
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary focus on Asian American history, culture, and politics.

majors.name: Asian Studies
majors.department: Department of East Asian Languages and Cultural Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Regional focus on East Asia with language requirement.

majors.name: Biochemistry
majors.departmental_electives_note: Selective major. Heavy chemistry and biology integration. Pre-med and biotech paths.

majors.name: Biological Sciences
majors.department: Department of Ecology, Evolution, and Marine Biology / MCDB
majors.departmental_electives_note: BS Biological Sciences spans EEMB and MCDB. Selective major for transfers.

majors.name: Biopsychology
majors.departmental_electives_note: BS track with heavier biology and neuroscience than BA Psychology.

majors.name: Black Studies
preparation_for_major: BL ST 1 — Introduction to Black Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary study of African diaspora history, culture, and politics.

majors.name: Chemistry
majors.departmental_electives_note: ACS-certified track available. Selective major.

majors.name: Chicano and Chicana Studies
majors.department: Department of Chicana and Chicano Studies
preparation_for_major: CH ST 1A-B — Introduction to Chicana/o Studies
Related history or Spanish language course
majors.departmental_electives_note: Focus on Chicana/o and Latina/o history, culture, and social justice.

majors.name: Chinese
majors.department: Department of East Asian Languages and Cultural Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Language proficiency through advanced coursework required.

majors.name: Classics
majors.departmental_electives_note: Emphasis on ancient Greek and Roman languages, literature, and history.

majors.name: Communication
majors.departmental_electives_note: Selective major with prep GPA requirement.

majors.name: Comparative Literature
majors.departmental_electives_note: Cross-cultural literary study; foreign language proficiency required.

majors.name: Dance
majors.departmental_electives_note: BFA requires audition. BA track available.

majors.name: Earth Science
majors.departmental_electives_note: BA and BS tracks with emphases in climate, geology, geobiology, geophysics.

majors.name: Ecology and Evolution
majors.department: Department of Ecology, Evolution, and Marine Biology
majors.departmental_electives_note: Selective major. Focus on population, community, and evolutionary biology.

majors.name: Economics
preparation_for_major: Pre-major GPA 2.85+ on ECON 1, 2, 10A (UC courses only; no grade below C)
upper_division_required: Six additional upper-division ECON electives (24 units total UD)
majors.departmental_electives_note: Selective major. ECON 5 and 10A must be taken at UCSB.
majors.notes: ECON 5 and ECON 10A must be taken at UCSB.

majors.name: Economics and Accounting
preparation_for_major: GPA 2.75+ in prep courses (C or better each)
majors.departmental_electives_note: Selective major. Combines economics with accounting coursework. Verify accounting course list with department.

majors.name: English
upper_division_required: Upper-division ENG by historical period and genre
majors.departmental_electives_note: Literature and creative writing tracks available.

majors.name: Environmental Studies
preparation_for_major: ENV S 1 — Introduction to Environmental Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary BA/BS with science and policy tracks.

majors.name: Feminist Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary focus on gender, sexuality, and social justice.

majors.name: Film and Media Studies
majors.department: Department of Film and Media Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Critical studies and production tracks.

majors.name: Financial Mathematics and Statistics
majors.departmental_electives_note: Quantitative finance and statistics focus.

majors.name: French
majors.departmental_electives_note: Language proficiency through advanced coursework.

majors.name: Geography
majors.departmental_electives_note: BA human geography and BS physical geography/GIS emphases.

majors.name: German
majors.department: Department of Germanic and Slavic Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Language and cultural studies of German-speaking world.

majors.name: Global Studies
upper_division_required: Senior capstone or study abroad integration
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary international affairs major. Study abroad encouraged.

majors.name: History
upper_division_required: Upper-division HIST by region and era
majors.departmental_electives_note: Regional concentrations available.

majors.name: History of Art and Architecture
majors.department: Department of History of Art and Architecture
majors.departmental_electives_note: Visual culture from antiquity to contemporary.

majors.name: History of Policy, Law, and Governance
preparation_for_major: POL S 1 or introductory policy course
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary major combining history with policy and law.

majors.name: Hydrologic Sciences and Policy
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary water science and policy program.

majors.name: Italian Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Italian language, literature, and cultural studies.

majors.name: Japanese
majors.department: Department of East Asian Languages and Cultural Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Language proficiency through advanced coursework.

majors.name: Language, Culture, and Society
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary sociolinguistics and language in society.

majors.name: Latin American and Iberian Studies
preparation_for_major: Latin American history or culture survey
majors.departmental_electives_note: Latin American and Iberian cultures in Spanish/Portuguese.

majors.name: Linguistics
majors.departmental_electives_note: Formal linguistics with phonology, syntax, and semantics.

majors.name: Mathematics
majors.departmental_electives_note: BA and BS tracks. Selective major for transfers.

majors.name: Medieval Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary medieval Europe major.

majors.name: Middle East Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Interdisciplinary study of Middle East history, politics, and culture.

majors.name: Molecular and Cellular Biology
majors.department: Department of Molecular, Cellular, and Developmental Biology
majors.departmental_electives_note: Selective major. Molecular and cellular focus. Pre-med and biotech.

majors.name: Music Performance / Music Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: BM requires audition. BA in music studies also available.

majors.name: Philosophy
preparation_for_major: PHIL 20A-B-C — History of Philosophy sequence (or equivalent)
Logic requirement (PHIL 3 or 4 or approved substitute)
upper_division_required: Upper-division PHIL courses distributed across areas
Core Philosophy emphasis OR Ethics and Public Policy emphasis
majors.departmental_electives_note: Core Philosophy or Ethics and Public Policy emphasis.

majors.name: Physics
majors.departmental_electives_note: BS for grad school/technical careers. Selective major.

majors.name: Physiology
majors.department: Department of Molecular, Cellular, and Developmental Biology
majors.departmental_electives_note: Focus on organismal and systems physiology. Pre-med track.

majors.name: Political Science
preparation_for_major: POL S 6 — Introduction to Data Analysis
POL S 7 — Introduction to International Relations
POL S 12 — Introduction to Comparative Politics
upper_division_required: Upper-division POL S in multiple subfields
majors.departmental_electives_note: Subfields: American, IR, comparative, theory, methods.

majors.name: Portuguese
majors.departmental_electives_note: Portuguese language and Luso-Brazilian studies.

majors.name: Psychological and Brain Sciences
upper_division_required: Additional upper-division PSY electives per major sheet
majors.departmental_electives_note: Selective major. Verify prep GPA on department website.

majors.name: Religious Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Comparative study of world religions and secular traditions.

majors.name: Russian and East European Studies
majors.department: Department of Germanic and Slavic Studies
majors.departmental_electives_note: Russian and East European languages, history, and culture.

majors.name: Sociology
upper_division_required: Upper-division SOC electives across substantive areas
majors.departmental_electives_note: Quantitative and qualitative methods tracks.

majors.name: Spanish
majors.departmental_electives_note: Spanish language, literature, and Hispanic cultures.

majors.name: Statistics and Data Science
majors.departmental_electives_note: BA and BS tracks. Selective major for transfers.

majors.name: Theater
majors.departmental_electives_note: BFA requires audition. Acting, design, and directing tracks.

majors.name: Zoology
majors.department: Department of Ecology, Evolution, and Marine Biology
majors.departmental_electives_note: Animal biology focus within EEMB. Selective major.
